name: normalization_run_id
description: Normalization run ID that produced this active or staged entity.

name: entity_type
description: job, criterion, context, pain, workaround, solution, or people_role.

name: normalized_statement
description: Canonical JTBD wording for this entity.

name: passage_score_sum
description: Sum of claim-local passage scores across linked evidence.

name: thread_score_sum
description: Sum of source-thread scores across linked evidence.

name: thread_comment_count_sum
description: Sum of source-thread comment counts across linked evidence.

name: active
description: Whether this entity belongs to the active JTBD Taxonomy.
